creator: sk8harddiefast@gmail.com
text:
I Installed ettercap and compiled just fine.
But scanning for hosts using GUI I get segmentation fault.
Searching on internet I found that is a bug and they release here: https://launchpad.net/~timothy-redaelli/+archive/drizzt/+build/1758138 a debian package that fix the problem and works.
Is it possible please to port somehow the latest fix?
